query: Justwrite complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: ‎Just Write - App For Writer App - App Store
results.content: This app is amazing! I love how I can keep everything in organized files and the parts don’t get all mixed up based on the last time I worked on them. I usually use my notes just to keep things in one place, and this app is even greater because it shows how many words/characters there are in one part. AND it says how many minutes it takes to read it. Just Write amazingly created and easy!But I have one complaint—when I save and exit a part after working on it, I come back and it doesn’t save even though I saved it. For example, I was working on a project and when I left a part it didn’t save and all of my progress was lost. I tried rewriting it multiple times, but every time it just disappeared after I left. I also tried uninstalling and installing the app, but it still didn’t work. Is [...] This robust text editor uses \.rtf and \.txt formats. It supports Markdown. Translation, everything you write is functionally future proof. You will always be able to find a text editor that supports Markdown.The Good: simple interface, easy to organize, future proof, Markdown means you can move the files to anything. \.txt means no one will ever create a word processor/text editor that can’t read your files and output them ready to continue writing. Text files are also small, so storage isn’t a problem, even on the 400pg document I’m currently writing. I use Highland2 on my laptop, and it loves the text output from Just Write. Highland2 also makes the multiple files I tend to write large documents in easy to assemble.The Bad: it’s got a crashing problem. I suspect it originates from [...] and installing the app, but it still didn’t work. Is there something that I can do for that? Also, that is the only complaint I have for this. Thanks!

results.title: Just Write Review - The Curriculum Choice
results.content:
PROS:

Truly there are not any cons in the Just Write Series except for the mere fact that there are not additional workbooks in the series. All of my older children that have completed the series have become confident and expressive writers. The organized structure of all the lessons encouraged them to get their initial ideas down on paper without worrying about grammar, spelling, or form. After their ideas were down on paper, they were free to correct any grammatical errors with the editing checklist.

The low cost of each workbook is exciting to me. You definitely will get your moneys worth out of this series as well as a creative, confident writer. Here are the low prices for each workbook that can be purchased at Educators Publishing Service. [...] I just had to leave a quick comment. I found out about Just Write yesterday when I saw it posted for sale on Homeschool Classifieds, so I looked it up.  
It really looked like the answer to my prayers for my 8 yo dd, a reluctant writer who cries almost every single time I ask her to do any writing.  
I love the fact that it is a work on your own thing, which is really helpful when there are 6 children to work with, as you know.  
I have to admit that as a mostly Charlotte Mason homeschooler, I, for a second, got a twinge of “you shouldn’t be using a workbook”, but I quickly banished the thought. [...] The Just Write Series can be a supplement to any language arts program or can be used as a stand alone writing program – making it very flexible. Since my students complete copywork everyday, I do not feel the need to supplement in writing. Although grammar is briefly explained in the lessons, I do recommend using an additional grammar program since the main focus of Just Write is writing quality content.

[](

My oldest three sons have completed the series with great success and enjoy creative writing even today.  At one time, I was homeschooling a friend’s child, a reluctant writer, who blossomed after only completing the Just Write 3. She grew in confidence and utilized the writing organization tools taught in the book to create future expressive writing assignments.

PROS:

results.title: Just Write | Desktop & Android Writing App ($5.99, one-time)
results.content:
## Support

What is JustWrite for?

JustWrite helps you overcome writer's block through free writing: a technique where you write quickly and continuously, without worrying about structure, grammar, or formatting. Because you cannot edit or delete what you have already written, the app encourages you to keep moving forward and unlock your creative flow.

Why is the app paid?

JustWrite is built by independent developers. Selling the app is what allows us to maintain it and keep developing future versions for more platforms.

Can I try the app before buying?

The app works just like the online version, with one key difference: Focus Mode is available on Windows, Mac and Android, not online.

If the app does not work for you or does not meet your needs, you can request a refund. [...] Just Write

Get AppSupport

## Support

What is JustWrite for? [...] Do I need a separate license for each device?

For Windows and Mac desktop versions, one license can be used on up to three devices at the same time. The Android version is purchased separately through Google Play and is linked to your Google account under the Play Store's standard terms.

How can I contact you?

Send any questions, suggestions, or issues to hello@calmly.studio

# Just Write, the free writing space with no delete button

JustWrite is a free online writing app to practice free writing, a way to overcome writer's block.

results.title: Just write. : r/writers - Reddit
results.content: Just write it. Write it all down. Day after day. Until its done. Then start poking it with a stick. Don't poke it before it's done. Don't worry. Just write.
